title: Baked Slovakian Chicken with Gooey Crust
description: A hearty Slovakian-inspired dish featuring chicken with a gooey crust. This recipe is perfect for a comforting dinner.
instructions: Cut the Slovakian bread into small cubes and mix with gooey cheese.
In a separate bowl, beat the eggs.
In a baking dish, arrange the chicken breast.
Spread the bread and cheese mixture evenly over the chicken.
Pour the beaten eggs over the top.
Bake for 30 minutes or until the cheese is golden brown.
Let the dish rest for 5 minutes before serving.
Slice the chicken and serve hot.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
